message:
fix(pager): use max(header, file) for db_size during refresh to prevent BusySnapshot

A crash between growing the database file and updating the header's
page_count leaves page_count stale even when the stale marker is not
set. The refresh path trusted header.page_count unconditionally,
causing BusySnapshot errors on reopen for the newly-committed page.

Always cross-check against the actual file size so pages committed
before a crash are visible after recovery.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
